title: Bishop Cathedral Tablet Schema
description: Append-only JSONL tablet format for Bishop's Cathedral Scribes (SP-22/23 / K436). Extended K455c/B121 with scope field.

scope.description: Access scope for this tablet. Values: 'public' (visible to all cross-Cathedral consultation), 'private' (caller-owned only), 'guild:<name>', 'tribe:<name>'. Default for existing tablets: 'public'.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this tablet was appended

session.description: Session ID that generated this tablet (e.g., B121, K461)

observation.description: What this tablet records — the canonical observation text

source.description: How this observation was generated (e.g., founder_dialogue, bishop_ship, knight_ship)

canonical_ref.description: File path or artifact reference this tablet was derived from

source_session.description: Session ID (alternate field, used by R11 ingestion and Knight-format tablets)

source_document.description: Source document path (alternate field, used by R11 ingestion and Knight-format tablets)

category.description: Primary category tag (used by R11 ingestion)

timestamp.description: Alternate timestamp field (used by R11 ingestion and Knight-format tablets)

_notes.append_only: Tablets are NEVER modified after writing. Corrections are new entries with a supersedes pointer.
_notes.scope_retrofit: Retrofitted K455c — all pre-existing tablets gain scope: 'public' via retrofit-tablet-scope.mjs.
_notes.knight_compat: Bishop field names (ts/session/canonical_ref) differ from Knight field names (timestamp/source_session/source_document). Cross-Cathedral reads normalize to a common view.
